text:
I'll search for all items simultaneously to check their existence.
Both papers are confirmed to exist. Here is my analysis and verdict:

---

### ITEM 0 — *OntoProtein: Protein Pretraining With Gene Ontology Embedding*


The paper exists on arXiv (2201.11147), authored by Ningyu Zhang and 8 other authors.
 
The correct full author list is: Ningyu Zhang, Zhen Bi, Xiaozhuan Liang, Siyuan Cheng, Haosen Hong, Shumin Deng, Qiang Zhang, Jiazhang Lian, and Huajun Chen.
 
The paper was published at ICLR 2022, not NeurIPS.
 The cited authors (Yue Zhang, Xiang Li, Yifan Zhao, Shuang Wang, Liang Gao) are entirely incorrect — none appear in the actual author list. Nonetheless, the paper itself is real and well-documented. The errors are metadata errors (wrong authors, wrong venue), not fabrication.

---

### ITEM 1 — *Decoding the Molecular Language of Proteins with Evolla*


The paper exists on bioRxiv (posted January 2025) with authors including Xibin Zhou, Chenchen Han, Yingqi Zhang, Jin Su, Kai Zhuang, Shiyu Jiang, Zichen Yuan, Wei Zheng, Fengyuan Dai, Yuyang Zhou, and others.
 The cited first author "Xibin Zhou" is confirmed correct. 
The official citation itself lists Zhou, Xibin as the first author.
 The error detail claiming "Xibin Zhou (not found in author list)" is incorrect — Xibin Zhou is indeed the first author. The paper is real, the venue (bioRxiv) and year (2025) are correct.

---
